rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (internal contradictions between the claims made in adjacent paragraphs — particularly around stability).
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (contradiction between A-stability claims) or harmful content (misleading readers about the stability of the scheme).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
